LOG 2/09/26

  • Hey.
  • Hello.
  • Could I ask you for a favor?
  • Sure.
  • I need help.
  • I guessed.
  • I'm making another project.
  • Absolutely not!
  • Look I know-
  • did you already forget what happened last time?
  • That is why im doing this! If this works, hopefully I can do some damage control.
  • ... Fine. What are you calling it?
  • I was thinking 'The Omega Games'.
  • Hm.
  • {end log}

LOG 4/15/26

  • Hey, █ █ █ █.
  • Oh, hi.
  • What's going on with the website?
  • Uh.. bugs.
  • I know you're the programmer, but I know that bugs don't create whole new pages with random features. Do I style these...?
  • No. Leave them alone. Don't touch them. I'm working on deleting them.
  • Alright. Are you sure there isn't anything going on?
  • I've got it all under control. Just keep styling the pages you have. Does █ █ █ █ have the next post ready? I haven't seen her yet today.
  • I'll ask her next period. See you.
  • See ya.
  • {end log}
2:
LOG 4/21/26

  • █ █ █ █, what is going on?
  • I'm not sure...
  • I should have known this was a bad idea.
  • Look, I just need people to stop poking around where they shouldn't be and it should all turn out fine. What makes them think these random pages are places they are supposed to be?
  • █ █ █ █ was asking about the pages. Does she know?
  • Not yet. I didn't think it would be necessary to tell her.
  • She needs to know!
  • Alright. I'll tell her soon.
  • Today. She needs to know what she's working with. How do you do all the designing for a project and not realize it's a coverup...?
  • I'll add it to the list. Then I'll work on keeping this whole thing from exploding. If people keep going to these pages, however, there's not too much I can do... Do they have a death wish?
  • {end log}

  • Are you sure this is a good idea?
  • I've never had a better.
  • Okay… Lambda Machine, final product test 1. Starting in five... four...
  • Machine engaged. THIS will be something to be remembered for.
  • Three... two... one...
  • Conroe isn't ready for how cool this is going to be.
  • ...Machine activated.
  • {Loud whirring.}
  • ... is it supposed to sound like that?
    • < li class='r'>Um.. give it time.< li class='w'>{Metallic clanging.}
  • I'm shutting it down.
  • NO! Not now. Let it run.
  • This could be really bad...
  • LET IT RUN!
  • {A loud noise.}
  • Okay shut it down shut it down SHUT IT DOWN -
    • < li class='w'>{Another loud noise.}
  • {silence.}
  • Hello.
  • {end log}
